SAVAGE_COMMAND_BENCHMARKER_REPORT.disclaimer: All roasts backed by cold, hard data

savage_assessment.evidence: This isn't a command, it's a PhD dissertation with code aspirations
savage_assessment.statistical_roast: At 356 lines, this command has more lines than some entire codebases. That's not 'ultra-thinking', that's ultra-procrastinating from actually solving the problem.

violations_detected: Multiple design patterns for simple problem
ultrathink.md.death_sentence: GUILTY of premature abstraction in the first degree. Sentenced to immediate refactoring.

irony_analysis.actual_result: 249 lines of documentation to decide IF to implement

java-rapid-implementation.md.CLAUDE_MD_COMPLIANCE: MARGINAL - Obsessed with scoring but creates scoring overhead

savage_assessment.evidence: Spends 249 lines explaining how to be simple. The irony is suffocating.
savage_assessment.statistical_roast: This 'rapid' implementation command takes longer to execute than writing the Java code manually. It's like building a factory to make a single paperclip.

violations_detected: Command longer than most Java classes it aims to create
java-rapid-implementation.md.death_sentence: GUILTY of false advertising. A 'rapid' command that's anything but.

adhd-context-switch.md.CLAUDE_MD_COMPLIANCE: FAILING - Creates complexity for complexity-sensitive users

savage_assessment.evidence: Designed for ADHD users but requires enterprise architect-level attention span to understand
savage_assessment.statistical_roast: At 398 lines, this command for ADHD context-switching will itself cause context-switching fatigue. It's like prescribing marathon running to cure leg cramps.

violations_detected: Longest command for users with attention challenges
adhd-context-switch.md.death_sentence: GUILTY of accessibility malpractice. Build for ADHD, not against it.

intelligent-code-enhancer.md.CLAUDE_MD_COMPLIANCE: CATASTROPHIC FAILURE - Violates every simplicity principle

savage_assessment.evidence: 441 lines to enhance code but 0 lines of actual enhancement
savage_assessment.statistical_roast: This is enhancement inception - it enhances the process of thinking about enhancing the planning of enhancements. At some point, just enhance the damn code.

violations_detected: Longest command in the sample (441 lines)
intelligent-code-enhancer.md.death_sentence: GUILTY of philosophical masturbation masquerading as utility.

git_operation_ratio.comparison: Git itself has less documentation per command

git-backup-sync.md.CLAUDE_MD_COMPLIANCE: TOTAL VIOLATION - Most complex command in sample

savage_assessment.evidence: 530 lines to sync a git repo. Git was invented to be simple.
savage_assessment.statistical_roast: This command has more documentation than the Linux kernel git implementation. It takes longer to read this command than to manually sync 50 repositories.

violations_detected: Longest command in entire sample (530 lines)
Architectural complexity for basic shell operations
git-backup-sync.md.death_sentence: GUILTY of turning a 3-command git workflow into a distributed systems architecture.

immediate_actions: DELETE 80% of documentation from each command
Replace philosophical thinking with actual implementation
Test commands with actual users (spoiler: they'll hate the complexity)

FINAL_SAVAGE_VERDICT.evidence_summary: 5 commands, 1,974 lines, 0% compliance with stated simplicity principles
FINAL_SAVAGE_VERDICT.scientific_conclusion: These commands suffer from acute abstraction addiction and chronic complexity creep.
FINAL_SAVAGE_VERDICT.prescription: Immediate simplicity intervention required. Start over with 10-line maximum per command.
FINAL_SAVAGE_VERDICT.prognosis: Without intervention, users will create their own simple alternatives and abandon this complexity circus entirely.
